metadata.description: winded.vertigo collective agents — Mo (CMO), PaM (project/momentum manager), and cARL (research). Each pairs a persona skill with a memory MCP server backed by the shared port.windedvertigo.com memory layer.

plugins.name: mo-cmo
plugins.description: Mo — winded.vertigo's chief marketing officer. Persistent memory across conversations.

plugins.name: pam-pm
plugins.description: PaM — winded.vertigo's project and momentum manager. Tracks commitments, dependencies, and follow-ups.

plugins.name: carl-research
plugins.description: cARL — winded.vertigo's cyber agent of research and learning. Living library of evidence and findings.
